message:
test(pt-core): extend signature CLI and posterior coverage with 82 new inline tests (process_triage-aii.7)

signature_cli.rs: 0→31 tests (+31) covering parse_category (all 6 variants + case
insensitive + unknown/empty), format_signature_output (JSON/Toon/Md), path helpers,
SignatureSchema serde, SignatureDatabase built-in sigs (non-empty, named, builtin),
ProcessMatchContext matching, env var parsing, SignaturePatterns/SupervisorSignature
construction.

inference/posterior.rs: 5→56 tests (+51) covering ClassScores (from_vec, as_vec,
default, serde), EvidenceTerm/PosteriorResult serde, PosteriorError display, Evidence
default, add_scores, ln_checked (positive/zero/negative/NaN), log_lik_beta_bernoulli
(true/false/asymmetric/invalid), optional_beta_bernoulli (None/Some), dirichlet
categorical (uniform/asymmetric/out-of-range/zero-alpha), log_binomial_continuous
(valid/edge/invalid), log_lik_runtime (no gamma/negative/zero/NaN), compute_posterior
(sums to 1, all evidence types, asymmetric priors, binomial with eta, error cases).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
